dependencies: Raw materials including steel, brass, copper, aluminum, nickel, rubber and thermoplastic materials and chemicals
Global supply chain with operations in 43 countries
risks: Price and supply fluctuations of raw materials
Transportation delays and supply chain disruptions
Supplier price increases in response to raw material costs
Tariffs and governmental trade restrictions impact on raw material availability and pricing
Geopolitical risks including Russia-Ukraine conflict affecting supply chains
Inflation impacting material and freight costs

regulatory_risks: Environmental laws and regulations including U.S. federal Superfund law
Greenhouse gas emissions regulations and climate change legislation
Income tax law changes and judicial or regulatory interpretations
U.S. Foreign Corrupt Practices Act compliance
Antitrust and competition laws in U.S. and Europe
Government acquisition regulations for U.S. government contracts
OECD Pillar Two global minimum tax framework
Intellectual property protection laws varying by jurisdiction

sanction_risks: Russia sanctions and potential nationalization of foreign businesses
Trade restrictions including possible restrictions on trade with China
Potential retaliatory action by Russian government against companies
